name: Reqnroll
description: Open-source fork of SpecFlow maintained by its original creators after Tricentis discontinued SpecFlow, fully compatible with .gherkin/.feature files.

seo.title: Reqnroll — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Reqnroll: Open-source fork of SpecFlow maintained by its original creators after Tricentis discontinued SpecFlow, fully compatible with .gherkin/.feature files.

when_to_use: SpecFlow-compatible BDD for .NET with active maintenance
Gherkin feature files mapped to C# step definitions
Migration path for teams leaving discontinued SpecFlow

cons: Some SpecFlow plugins not yet ported
BDD overhead only pays off with real stakeholders
review.verdict: The right destination for every SpecFlow project after Tricentis shut the original down; migration is straightforward.
review.best_for: SpecFlow users needing a maintained, open-source BDD framework on .NET
review.not_for: New .NET projects where BDD overhead is not justified
